steps.title: Spot the shift from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence introduces descriptive notations as a broad category. The blank must be filled with a transition that introduces specific examples.

steps.title: Match the transitional signal
steps.content: For example is the transition used to move from a general statement to its specific instances. The other three indicate contrast, concession, or sequential ordering instead. That matches choice C — C is correct.
